author: Austin Crawford
title: The Atlantic Restaurant
summary: Enjoy Tapas, cocktails and beautiful sunsets on this Victorian Inn’s veranda and lawn, then finish the evening with a romantic candlelight dinner in the Inn’s much-acclaimed and award-winning restaurant.
content:
Enjoy Tapas, cocktails and beautiful sunsets on this Victorian Inn’s veranda and lawn, then finish the evening with a romantic candlelight dinner in the Inn’s much-acclaimed and award-winning restaurant.

 



Our talented Executive Chef Francis Cavanagh invites you to The Atlantic Restaurant to enjoy a din­ing expe­ri­ence unpar­al­leled on Block Island. Relax and enjoy a roman­tic din­ner while sip­ping a glass of wine from our exten­sive and Award Win­ning wine list. 

Serving lunch from 11:30 - 3:00 on Saturdays and Sundays in July and August



View Menus

 


An award-winning restaurant
 

The Atlantic Restaurant at the Atlantic Inn has been awarded accolades and received recognition from numerous publications including Bön Appétit, Trav­el and Leisure, The Prov­i­dence Jour­nal, Gourmet, Rhode Island Mag­a­zine, Yan­kee, Wine Spec­ta­tor and more…

Rec­og­nized for its Wine List,  received the pres­ti­gious Wine Spec­ta­tor “Award of Excel­lence” as well as the “BEST of — Award of Excel­lence” a top national accolade.

Reservations suggested.


 

Reserve Table With Open Table

 




Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: National Hotel Tap & Grille
summary: The National Hotel Tap & Grille is the most well known porch on the island overlooking the Atlantic Ocean. Enjoy the ferries coming and going and people watching galore. Our diverse menu specializes in seafood and offers a variety of appetizers, salads and island favorites.  Try our New England lobster bake.
content:
The National Hotel Tap & Grille is the most well known porch on the island overlooking the Atlantic Ocean. Enjoy the ferries coming and going and people watching galore. Our diverse menu specializes in seafood and offers a variety of appetizers, salads and island favorites.  Try our New England lobster bake.

We were awarded the best Chowder on Block Island at the 2024 ChowdaFest.

The Tap & Grille serves brunch, lunch, and dinner daily.





 

View Menu

or

Reserve Table With Open Table

 

 

There is also a fire pit area in the back serving cocktails and light bites nightly. 



We have entertainment every weekend from mid-June to mid-September and our outside bar is the perfect spot to watch the world go by.

 

Entertainment Schedule

 

There is entertainment every day during the summer. 


Member Block Island Chamber

author: Robert Lucier
title: La Bella Rose - Professional Wedding Flowers
summary: Wedding days and wedding pictures become fabulous with beautiful floral designs!
content:
Wedding days and wedding pictures become fabulous with beautiful floral designs!




With a passion for flowers, Jamie founded La Bella Rose in 2007 to create professional floral designs for couples on their most special day.

Formally educated in both fine art and floral design, she applies knowledge of color, form, and professional technique to create a range of design styles from the natural wildflower look to elegantly lush and romantic designs. 
​
BFA, MFA, Canadian Institute of Floral Design graduate and FDI Certified Wedding Specialist 



Jamie enjoys working closely with clients to understand their personal style and vision for their wedding flowers. From a beach ceremony to a large formal wedding, she is committed to using blossoms of the highest quality and creating exceptionally beautiful designs to bring each couple's vision to life. 




Her work has thrilled hundreds of couples, and La Bella Rose comes highly recommended by Block Island's most popular venues.

To learn more about wedding flowers by La Bella Rose contact Jamie today!


Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Rose Farm Inn
summary: Enjoy a peaceful, naturally beautiful setting with the convenience of being close to fine dining, town and beaches. Fresh spacious rooms with queen/king beds, ocean or Island views, private baths and decks. Continental breakfast included. Room amenities include WiFi, A/C, ceiling fans, TV, hair dryer, toiletries, mini refrigerator, free parking, beach towels, ice machine, guest washer/dryer and evening fire pit. Bicycle rentals on premises.
content:
Enjoy a peaceful, naturally beautiful setting with the convenience of being close to fine dining, town and beaches. Fresh spacious rooms with queen/king beds, ocean or Island views, private baths and decks. Continental breakfast included. Room amenities include WiFi, A/C, ceiling fans, TV, hair dryer, toiletries, mini refrigerator, free parking, beach towels, ice machine, guest washer/dryer and evening fire pit. Bicycle rentals on premises. 

Enjoy Block Island’s natural beauty; it doesn’t get better than this!

Yankee Magazine award recipient for Best Rooms with a View.



The Farm House

Recognized by Scenic Block Island, the Rose family home with its grand beach stone porch and flower gardens has ten ocean or island view guest rooms entered from interior halls. There is a sunlit breakfast room and a large ocean view sundeck. 



The Captain Rose House

Named in honor of the Rose family sea captains, the Captain Rose House has an expansive veranda with garden view and decks overlooking the rolling fields. Nine guest rooms entered from the outdoors have ocean or island views. 



 

Book A Room

 







Beach Rose Bicycles 

Enjoy the convenience of the island’s best bicycle rental here at the Rose Farm Inn.

Featured on Boston Chronicle


Member Block Island Chamber

author: aininja.pro
title: New London Hi-Speed Ferry - BI Express
summary: Hi-Speed ferry service from New London, CT to Block Island, RI. Reservations are Highly Recommended.
content:
Hi-Speed ferry service from New London, CT to Block Island, RI. Reservations are Highly Recommended. 

 

New London 2024 Ferry Schedule

 

Book Tickets

 

As the fastest ferry between Block Island and the mainland, the Jessica W has a cruising speed of more than 35 knots (40 mph) and is equipped with comfortable, modern airline-style seating on two enclosed air-conditioned passenger decks. For those who prefer the great outdoors, an outside passenger deck is available for viewing the scenery on the trip between New London and Block Island.

Other passenger amenities include a satellite television entertainment system, culinary offerings that include homemade pastries, personal pizzas, hot soft pretzels, other snack options, and a selection of craft beers, wine, and specialty cocktails including Cross Sound Deli’s famous Bloody Mary.

author: Will Gasner
title: The Block Island Power Company
summary: The Block Island Power Company proudly serves Block Islanders with safe and reliable energy. The Block Island Power Company prides itself with our quick response in restoring outages. Please use these numbers to report outages 24X7 and we'll dispatch crews immediately to restore power.  Have a good day and enjoy this weather!
content:
The Block Island Power Company proudly serves Block Islanders with safe and reliable energy. The Block Island Power Company prides itself with our quick response in restoring outages. Please use these numbers to report outages 24X7 and we'll dispatch crews immediately to restore power.  Have a good day and enjoy this weather! 

Our normal business hours are Monday-Friday 7:30AM - 4:30PM.

Contact Numbers For Normal Business Hours: 401-466-5851 (primary) or 401-466-7754 (secondary)

Non-Business Hours (24X7): 401-466-3220 (New Shoreham Central Dispatch)

author: Austin Crawford
title: Hula Charters
summary: The Hula Dog is a 27ft Shamrock with an in-board engine. The vessel has high gunnels with wrap around padding and a spacious back deck. Since its a center console you can cast off the bow and move around the boat freely. Matt also has a flats boat for fly fishing and stalking bass in the shallows.
content:
The Hula Dog is a 27ft Shamrock with an in-board engine. The vessel has high gunnels with wrap around padding and a spacious back deck. Since its a center console you can cast off the bow and move around the boat freely. Matt also has a flats boat for fly fishing and stalking bass in the shallows.

Come join Captain Matt for an epic day of fishing on Block Island! The water surrounding Block Island is loaded with fish from May though October. You’ll catch many species of fish ranging from giant striped bass and aggressive blue fish to feisty sea bass and vigorous fluke. Block Island is known as the striper capital of the world however we also come upon bonita, false albacore and just south of the island we’ve caught Mahi Mahi, bluefin tuna, and other pelagic species. We also offer tours of the Block Island Wind Farm.




Member Block Island Chamber
address: Old Harbor Charter Dock, New Shoreham, RI 02807

author: Robert Lucier
title: Free Chamber Member Listing
summary: You can promote your business with a 50-word description and a photo.  The free listing as a chamber member can include up to  50 words.
content:
You can promote your business with a 50-word description and a photo.  The free listing as a chamber member can include up to  50 words.


Your listing includes your location and placement in one category.  You get buttons that allow app users to quickly call your business, view your website, send an email, and get directions.

author: Robert Lucier
title: Enhanced Listing
summary: The enhanced listing gives you more freedom to attract customers.
content:
The enhanced listing gives you more freedom to attract customers.

Get 150 words to promote what makes you unique and include up to 3 photos.  This entire listing is 150 words in length.



Deliver a SMART Coupon right to a user's phone to entice people to try your product or service.

 

SMART Coupon Example

 

SMART Coupons are only limited by your imagination.  


Make people aware of your big events by placing up to 3 event listings in the upcoming events section of the app.

 

Event Listing Example

 



In addition, your listing will appear in the main category and up to 3 subcategories. For example, the main category - Food & Drink and 3 subcategories - Fine Dining, Seafood, and American.  



Learn more about the features mentioned above.  

Finally, you can add a button link to a schedule, menu, pdf, review site, or another site.  Plus add links to your social media pages. 


 

Sign Up Your Business

author: Robert Lucier
title: Premium Listing
summary: The premium listing allows your business to stand out on the app!
content:
The premium listing allows your business to stand out on the app!

You can promote your business with unlimited words, color text, and multiple photos.




Great selection of Sweatshirts & Tees


Deliver SMART Coupons right to a user's phone to entice people to try your product or service.   

 

SMART Coupon Example

 

Smart coupons can be tailored to your business. Some possible ideas include:

  • $10 Off Your First Purchase
  • Buy One Get 40% Off the Second Item
  • The First 15 Customer Get 30% Off During Race Week

Coupons are only limited by your imagination.  


In addition, show up on  upcoming events promoted on the apps home screen. 

Make sure everyone on the app is aware of your event.   

 

Upcoming Event Examples

 



Add links to your price list, menu, music schedule, or whatever you want.   

 

Menu Link Example

 

PDF Link Example 

 


In addition, your listing will appear in the main category and up to 5 subcategories. For example, the main category - Shopping and five subcategories - Gifts, Surf/Sports  Speciality, Clothing, Eyewear.  

Learn more about the advanced features mentioned above.  



Other Great Features

Your business will be geotagged so it is easy to find on mobile phones.  See the map at the bottom of the page to see the listing geotag.

Keep your customers engaged and connected to your social media pages. 

In addition, all listings include Actions Buttons that allow app users to quickly find and contact your business.

author: Robert Lucier
title: Listing Options
summary: The Block Island App has joined forces with the Block Island Chamber of Commerce to make it easier to get your business or service listed on the app.
content:
The Block Island App has joined forces with the Block Island Chamber of Commerce to make it easier to get your business or service listed on the app. 

There are two business listing options.  

Free Listing - $0
(must be a Chamber member)

  • 50-word business description
  •  One photo
  •  Listing in 1 category & 1 subcategory 
  •  Address & geolocation tag
  •  Action button to one-touch call
  •  Action button to email
  •  Action button to website
  •  Action button to directions

 

Basic Listing Example

 

Premium Listing - $497

  • Everything in free listing +
  • 150-word business description
  • ​ Multiple photos
  •  Links to online menu, Open Table, music schedule or whatever you want
  •  SMART Coupons
  •  Listings in the Events Calendar  (Appear on the Home Screen)
  •  Links to FB, Instagram & Twitter

 

 Premium Listing Example

 

Make sure your business get's seen by thousands of people right on their phones!   

If you have additional questions,  call the Chamber of Commerce (401-466-2982).

 


 

Sign Up Your Business

author: Robert Lucier
title: BI Restaurant & Bar (Premium)
summary: (This is an example of a Premium Listing.  Other options.)
content:
(This is an example of a Premium Listing.  Other options.) 

BI Restaurant & Bar has the freshest island oysters & a bar with a view of the water.  All our oysters are locally sourced in the clear ocean waters of BI.



Order a dozen raw oyster batch or try our lightly battered broasted oysters that will melt in your mouth. For the best seafood experience that Block Island has to offer, give us a try.

In addition to our fresh seafood, many of the herbs and vegetables found in our delectable meals are grown on our organic vegetable farm on the Block.  



For entrees, we have Block Island classics like swordfish, tuna, mussels, lobster plus a variety of beef & vegetarian options. Our signature raw bar is fully stocked with a variety of Block Island oysters, crisp cherrystones, littleneck clams, jumbo shrimp and more. Produce from our farm includes herbs such as rosemary and sage, salad greens, arugula, spinach, and micro-greens.

 

View Menu

or

Reserve Table With Open Table

 

You can have up to  5 button links on your listing.  Link to a PDF, your website,  web services like reservations or anything you like. 



For example, include a link so people can text you orders.  

 

TEXT US YOUR ORDER!

 

Or maybe link to Seapod to give customers the option for home delivery.

 


We also specialize in handcrafted cocktails. Let our master mixologists create a cocktail to pair perfectly with your delectable meal.



For the latest dinner deals, check out our coupon on the Discount & Deals section of the app.

 

Free Dessert Coupon

 

You can have up to 3 live SMART coupons at a time.  SMART Coupons can be for a specific time period, a specific number of uses (ie.  first 15 customers), and can be for a % discount or $ amount off.  SMART Coupons are only limited by your imagination.    

Hours: Open 7 days a week from noon to 9 pm every day.

Payments:  We accept all major credit cards: Amex, Visa, MC, & Discover.

Also, you can highlight any special events you have by using up to 10  upcoming event listings.  

You can also link to all your social media platforms, see the links at the bottom of the page.

Also at the bottom of all listings are Action Buttons that give phone users one-touch access to call, email, visit your website or get directions to your store.  

 


This is not a restaurant but meant to give you an idea of what a restaurant or bar listing can look like.  To learn more about various listing options, click the button below.

 

Listing Options

 

Click the phone or email button below to speak with the Chamber of Commerce about getting your business listed.

meta.title: The BI Oyster Bar Restaurant
meta.description: A new island oyster bar specializing in raw and cooked local oysters.

author: Robert Lucier
title: Advanced Features
summary: Here are more details on the various enhanced and premium features.
content:
Here are more details on the various enhanced and premium features.   

SMART Coupons

Deliver a SMART Coupon right to a user's phone to entice people to try your product or service.  

Smart coupons can be for a $ or % off discount and you can control the validity dates, number of available coupons, number of times a coupon can be used. 

Some coupons ideas include:

  • 10% off for the month of July
  • A one-time 25% off discount
  • 30% for the first 10 customers
  • Free dessert with purchase of any entree (one time use)

Create a coupon for any promotion you want.   All live coupons automatically show up in the Discount & Deals section of the app.

App users can access all available coupons, save them for later use or redeem them at once.  

You can have 1 live coupon with an Enhanced Listing and up to 3 live coupons with a Premium Listing. Also with the Premium Listing, you will receive monthly coupon usage reports.

Example SMART Coupon



Upcoming Event Listings

Get your upcoming events featured on the home screen (see photo below).  This will ensure that app users are aware of your big events.  

Listing can include images, date and time, and a 150-word description.  Motivate visitors to frequent all your events.

You can create 3 featured event listings with an Enhanced Listing and up to 10 upcoming featured events with a Premium Listing.



Category and Subcategories

Get your listing in multiple subcategories if it fits for your business. 

For example, the main category - Food & Drink and 3 subcategories - Fine Dining, Seafood, and American.

You can be in up to 3 subcategories with an Enhanced Listing and up to 5 subcategories with a Premium Listing.



Button Links

Make your listing interactive with button links to anything you want.   You could link to:

  • Open Table reservations
  • A dynamic menu on your website
  • A responsive entertainment calendar.
  • A PDF of your menu or price list.
  • Your Yelp or Google Business review page.

You can have one button link with an Enhanced Listing and multiple button links with a Premium Listing.

The button below is an example of a link to an external web page. 


 

Sign Up Your Business

author: Robert Lucier
title: BI Gift Shop (Premium)
summary: (This is an example of a Premium Listing. Other options.)
content:
(This is an example of a Premium Listing. Other options.) 
 

The BI Gift Shop is situated in the center of town along beautiful Water street. This second-generation family business has been supporting other local Block Island artisans and creators since 1979.

The shop offers a wide variety of souvenirs, clothes, bathing suits, sunglasses beach equipment, surfboards, local crafts, and much more unique items. We have the largest selection of clothes and handmade goods on the island.




We currently have over 25 crafters to choose from as well as many made in the U.S.A. merchandise items. Keeping our items sustainable and prices as reasonable as possible are our top priorities.

Check the Discount & Deals section of the app for our latest coupons.  

 

Special Coupons

 

Link to your specific coupon or a list of coupons.

You can have up to 3 live SMART coupons at a time.  SMART Coupons can be for a specific time period, a specific number of uses (ie.  first 15 customers), and can be for a % discount or $ amount off.  SMART Coupons are only limited by your imagination.    

For example, this gift store could do a one time offer of a free bottle of sunscreen with the purchase of a pair of sunglasses during the first two weeks of July.  



Huge Swimsuit Selection 

 

Hours: Open 7 days a week from 9 am to 9 pm every day.

Payments:  We accept all major credit cards: Amex, Visa, MC, & Discover.

 

Special Events:

Check out the special events we hold on the upcoming events section of the app. Click to see upcoming events on the app.  

 

Special Events

 

Just like SMART Coupons, you can link to your specific event or all upcoming events for today.

Buy tickets to our annual summer gift show.  Click the button below for an example link to Eventbrite. 

 

Tickets for Summer Sale Event

 

You can have up to  5 button links on your listing.  Link to a PDF, your website, or a section of your website.  




Or link to an online resource, blog, an article on the app or whatever.  

For example, add a button link to the Fun Fact article about Block Island on the app. 

 

Fun BI Facts

 

You can also link to all your social media platforms, see the links at the bottom of the page.

Also at the bottom of all listings are Action Buttons that give phone users one-touch access to call, email, visit your website or get directions to your store.

author: Robert Lucier
title: BI Rentals (Premium)
summary: (This is an example of a Premium Listing.  See other options.)
content:
(This is an example of a Premium Listing.  See other options.) 

BI Rentals we pride ourselves in offering the best bike and moped rental rates, repair & services, and selection for your entire family while you are visiting gorgeous Block Island.

With almost 30 years of combined experience renting bicycles on Block Island, our friendly staff is ready to make your Block Island vacation fun and trouble-free.  Located on Water Street right as you come off the ferry.




Hours:  9 am - 6 pm, 7 days a week (May 1 - Oct 1)

Payments:  We accept all major credit cards: Amex, Visa, MC, & Discover.

Ready To Go:

You can rent a moped or bike on the spot but for faster service use our online reservation system.  Click the link below to get started.  

 

Reserve Your Ride

 

(This is an example reservation system for bike company on another island.)

 




Our mopeds and bikes consist of some of the best brands in the business including Vespa, Peoples, Raleigh, Fuji and GT.

Also,  we run promotions throughout the summer which can be viewed right on the Block Island App! Our list of deals and coupons can be seen in the Discount and Deals section of the app. - just click the button below to make sure you don’t miss any of our special promotions!

 

Discount Deals

 

This is a link to a specific coupon.  It can also link to Discounts and Deals to see all coupons.

For example, you could create an offer "rent a bike and get 30% off your second bike rental" good for one use and only valid during Aug 15 - Aug 31.

title: BI Landscaping (Premium)
summary: (This is an example of a Premium Listing. Other options.)
content:
(This is an example of a Premium Listing. Other options.) 

 BI Landscape is a landscape design, landscape construction, and landscape maintenance firm on the beautiful Block Island.

We specialize in designing, creating, installing, and maintaining seaside landscapes, stonework, and gardens and habitat restoration.



Started by President/Owner George Littlefield thirty years ago. George’s background in horticulture, design, and construction has provided the foundation on which BI Landscape has grown.

BI Landscaping has built a great reputation and many successful relationships with on-Island and off-Island Landscape Architects, suppliers, contractors, architects, and clients. Schedule a call to speak with us about your project.

 

Schedule A Call

 

(Example of button link to online call scheduler. )

Our references will only reiterate this point. We realize that not every step is smooth and challenges are a part of every project. However, through strong communication and a willingness to work as a team, these challenges can only be overcome.

Our expertise will bring your Block Island landscaping and design project to completion with excellence. Check out our most recent project by clicking the button below.

 

Recent Work

 




We also offer basic lawn care, stone wall repair, and brush clearing year-round on the island.

Action Airlines provides an on-demand air charter service to and from Block Island State Airport (BID), as well as other destinations in the region.

Headed to Boston or an upstate wedding? We operate in and out of the greater Northeast– your location, your time, your passengers.

In business since 1973, our highly trained pilots put an emphasis on safety, and we make the entire process seamless and easy, with two sizes of aircraft. Call for a quote today!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Gunner | Roofing Siding Windows
content:
Gunner roofing was born out a necessity in the contracting industry to enhance the customer experience. Gunner’s Eddie and Andrew Prchal saw all the disparity in customer service and knew it was time for a change. Their mission is “to do the common thing, uncommonly well” and after going national, it seems as though they are continuing to do just that. 

They not only bring a stellar Gunner experience which they refer to as “the Gunner difference”, however, they also brought into the industry a groundbreaking technology which allows a customer to generate a quote in under an hour from their devices. 

Accepting all typed of payments including offering no – interest financing through Wells Fargo, it could not be simpler to book your dream, roofing, siding or windows project with Gunner. 

 

Click for a Quote

 

Go to gunnerroofing.com to get your roofing quote within an hour!
